Browse our gallery of completed electrical projects. We take pride in every job we do, big or small.

<div class="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8">
  <figure class="group">
    <div class="bg-gradient-to-br from-primary/20 to-secondary/20 rounded-2xl p-12 flex items-center justify-center aspect-square">
      <div class="text-6xl">⚡</div>
    </div>
    <figcaption class="mt-4 text-center">
      <h3 class="font-heading font-bold text-gray-900">Panel Upgrades</h3>
      <p class="text-gray-600 text-sm">Residential electrical panel upgrades</p>
    </figcaption>
  </figure>

  <figure class="group">
    <div class="bg-gradient-to-br from-secondary/20 to-primary/20 rounded-2xl p-12 flex items-center justify-center aspect-square">
      <div class="text-6xl">💡</div>
    </div>
    <figcaption class="mt-4 text-center">
      <h3 class="font-heading font-bold text-gray-900">Lighting Installations</h3>
      <p class="text-gray-600 text-sm">Indoor and outdoor lighting solutions</p>
    </figcaption>
  </figure>

  <figure class="group">
    <div class="bg-gradient-to-br from-primary/10 to-primary/30 rounded-2xl p-12 flex items-center justify-center aspect-square">
      <div class="text-6xl">🔌</div>
    </div>
    <figcaption class="mt-4 text-center">
      <h3 class="font-heading font-bold text-gray-900">Outlet & Switch</h3>
      <p class="text-gray-600 text-sm">Professional outlet and switch installations</p>
    </figcaption>
  </figure>

  <figure class="group">
    <div class="bg-gradient-to-br from-secondary/10 to-secondary/30 rounded-2xl p-12 flex items-center justify-center aspect-square">
      <div class="text-6xl">🏠</div>
    </div>
    <figcaption class="mt-4 text-center">
      <h3 class="font-heading font-bold text-gray-900">Home Wiring</h3>
      <p class="text-gray-600 text-sm">Complete home wiring for new construction</p>
    </figcaption>
  </figure>

  <figure class="group">
    <div class="bg-gradient-to-br from-primary/30 to-secondary/10 rounded-2xl p-12 flex items-center justify-center aspect-square">
      <div class="text-6xl">🔧</div>
    </div>
    <figcaption class="mt-4 text-center">
      <h3 class="font-heading font-bold text-gray-900">Commercial Services</h3>
      <p class="text-gray-600 text-sm">Electrical services for businesses</p>
    </figcaption>
  </figure>

  <figure class="group">
    <div class="bg-gradient-to-br from-secondary/30 to-primary/10 rounded-2xl p-12 flex items-center justify-center aspect-square">
      <div class="text-6xl">🛡️</div>
    </div>
    <figcaption class="mt-4 text-center">
      <h3 class="font-heading font-bold text-gray-900">Safety Inspections</h3>
      <p class="text-gray-600 text-sm">Comprehensive electrical safety checks</p>
    </figcaption>
  </figure>
</div>

<div class="mt-16 bg-gray-50 rounded-2xl p-8 text-center">
  <h3 class="text-2xl font-heading font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">Want to See More?</h3>
  <p class="text-gray-600 mb-6">Contact us to see examples of similar projects to yours. We're happy to show you our quality work firsthand.</p>
  <a href="/contact/" class="inline-block bg-primary text-white font-bold px-8 py-3 rounded-full hover:bg-primary-dark hover:scale-105 transition-all">
    Contact Us
  </a>
</div>
